evidence_summary: The sequence must visually communicate the extreme physical toll of atmospheric thinning and the immense mental strain required to manipulate Martian technology. Success relies on the mechanical progression of the plant's systems (doors/pumps) synchronized...

John Carter arrives at the Atmosphere Plant, finding a graveyard of workers. He uses his mental thought waves to unlock the three great doors and commands a survivor to restart the pumps before he collapses from oxygen deprivation.
